summary: 0.6.44 updates the demo3 deterministic scene builder so it ingests the authored center-screen control edits, preserves the unnamed A-B loop toggle, and keeps side-screen clones in local screen space instead of copying absolute transformed positions.
operatorSignals: The saved demo3 scene had a moved and resized volume slider, a renamed middle clear button, and a new A-B loop toggle that had been left unnamed.
The side-screen controls were parented correctly but still behaved like they had world-space transforms baked in, so the collective orientation under the angled screens still looked wrong.
actionsTaken: Updated the demo3 template to preserve the authored center-screen volume slider layout and a canonical A-B loop toggle.
Extended the builder source-atom resolution so it can find the new clear button naming and fall back to the unnamed A-B loop toggle by type plus text.
Switched side-screen control cloning to reuse the center control local transform basis under each target screen.
nonGoals: No new A-B toggle runtime behavior yet.
No slideshow, image-slider transport, or right-stick volume work in this slice.
